TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Guangfu mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 131.63 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.44 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.67 km¬≤), 10,741 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,865 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,982 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Guangfu ays psgayun 14 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Tafalong , Fata' an , Laso'ay , Alolong , Sado , Kalotong , O kakay , Atomo , Fahol .
S.PHON: …£uaŇč*u mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), **,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u …£uaŇč*u ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, ta*aloŇč , *ata Ē an , las~…ēo Ēaj , aloloŇč , s~…ēa*o , kalotoŇč , o kakaj , atomo , *ańßol .
S.FORM: Guangfu mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 131.63 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 28.44 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.67 km¬≤), 10,741 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,865 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 6,982 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Guangfu ays psgayun 14 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Tafalong , Fata' an , Laso'ay , Alolong , Sado , Kalotong , O kakay , Atomo , Fahol .
S.PHON: …£uaŇč*u mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), **,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u …£uaŇč*u ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, ta*aloŇč , *ata Ē an , las~…ēo Ēaj , aloloŇč , s~…ēa*o , kalotoŇč , o kakaj , atomo , *ańßol .
